page_metadata.biotools__summary:
Improving Protein Side-Chain Modeling by Deep Neural Networks and Ensemble Methods.

Side-chain modeling is critical for protein structure prediction since the uniqueness of the protein structure is largely determined by its side-chain packing conformation.
